title: [cross-impl] dao_origin_signature schema not closed for relational test
description: test_dao_origin_signature_schema_is_closed_and_relational fails because schema accepts invalid document (signature_valid=False) instead of rejecting per closed schema rules. Affects validation of Schnorr48 vectors used across Python reference, Rust lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs, and Zephyr lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c. Recent commits touching schnorr (b2c0ae3b3 etc.) and test vectors did not fix schema strictness. See tests/test_vectors.py:1095-1101.
